name: playerClosed
description: This is playerClosed it is fired when the kazagumo player is shut

name: playerCreate
description: This is PlayerCreate it is fired when a lavalink instance has been made or track has been added for the first time

name: playerDestroy
description: This is PlayerDestroy it fires when a lavalink player is destroyed/discarded

name: playerEmpty
description: This is playerEmpty this is fired when the queue is empty (like berks heart)

name: playerEnd
description: This is player playerEnd it is fired when the player has reached the end of a track/queue

name: playerResumed
description: This is PlayerResumed this is fired when the state of the player is no longer paused

name: playerStart
description: This is  PlayerStart this is fired when the player starts a track

name: playerUpdate
description: This is playerUpdate it is fired when the the state of the plllayer is updated in anyway

name: queueUpdate
description: This is QueueUpdate this is fired when the players queue has any tracks added or removed or positions changed.
